---
title: "Jingyuan Yang"
image: profile.JPG
about:
  template: trestles
  image-width: 15em
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/jingyuanyang
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/kayyang-bu
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:kayyang@bu.edu
    - icon: file-earmark-pdf
      text: Resume
      href: CV_JingyuanYang.pdf
---

Master of Science in Applied Business Analytics candidate at Boston University, 
with a background in data analytics, machine learning, and big data engineering.

Currently exploring generative AI applications in finance through coursework 
on RAG systems with SEC 10-K filings, and big data salary analytics on AWS EC2.

## Experience

**Kuaishou** — Data Analyst  
Analyzed platform traffic and revenue distribution, designed new monetization metrics, and optimized traffic allocation logic. 
Used SQL to perform a tiered analysis of how key factors impact the repurchase rate. Designed A/B tests and produced comprehensive experimental analysis reports. 
Independently led the Q2 platform performance review report. Leveraged SQL and BI dashboards to conduct multi-layered data analysis and visualization across dimensions

**Poizon** — Data Analyst  
Contributed to three major strategic projects on pricing model optimization, fixed-price mechanisms, and traffic algorithm strategy.
Conducted in-depth research on merchant acquisition, livestreaming development, and content-based traffic distribution across e-commerce models. 

## Education

**Boston University** — M.S. Applied Business Analytics

**The Chinese University of Hong Kong, Shen Zhen** - B.B.A Finance

## Skills

Python · SQL · R · PySpark · AWS · Tableau · Plotly · scikit-learn

## Resume

[Download my CV (PDF)](CV_Jingyuan Yang.pdf)
